HeroBanner.title: Architectural Vision, Built to Last.
HeroBanner.description: Yapitek Anka Construction brings quality, aesthetics, and engineering together in every project.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about Yapitek Anka Construction’s approach, values, and areas of expertise.
AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.lead: We bring engineering discipline, architectural care, and reliable delivery together under one roof.
AboutPage.p1: Across residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects, we manage planning, design, and construction with a holistic mindset. Quality, sustainability, and long-term value guide every decision we make.
AboutPage.p2: We communicate transparently with stakeholders, anticipate risks early, and put on-time delivery at the heart of how we work. Our goal is not only to hand over a building, but to create environments where people feel confident to live and work.
AboutPage.p3: Our team supports you at every stage—from site execution to project management—with experience and forward-looking solutions. Get in touch when you are ready to bring your next project to life.

AboutOurStory.wideBannerAlt: Yapitek Anka featured architecture and project view
AboutOurStory.title: Our roots and journey

cardText.0: A strong reference network built through development and partnerships—from flagship projects to complex mixed-use schemes.
cardText.1: A holistic view that weighs architectural quality, quality of life, and investment value together.
cardText.2: Transparent, controlled, measurable project management from land analysis through delivery.

longBody.0: Since 2014, Yapitek Anka Construction has operated across construction, real estate development, and investment—positioned as a built-environment brand that treats architectural quality and investment value as one agenda.
longBody.1: From day one, it has built a broad portfolio spanning residential, commercial, and mixed-use work, while also taking an active role in corporate buildings and social-impact projects.
longBody.2: Through development, execution, and project partnerships on schemes such as Evart Oran, Evart Yalikavak, Evart Mansion Yalikavak, May Life Incek, and Docs Vadi, it has earned a strong network of sector references.
longBody.3: Yapitek approaches every project not merely as a structure, but through the lens of long-term investment value, quality of life, and sustainability.
longBody.4: From land analysis to development, from architectural planning to execution and handover, every stage is managed with a transparent, controlled, and measurable system.
longBody.5: In the projects it develops, site selection, user-centered architecture, and investment potential are evaluated together.
longBody.6: This approach moves Yapitek beyond the role of a contractor—into the position of a developer that creates lasting value.

AboutApproach.title: Corporate discipline, clear processes
AboutApproach.subtitle: Across every project we work with reliable delivery, systematic development, and a clear mission–vision framework.
AboutApproach.c0Lead: Yapitek Anka Construction follows these core principles in all of its projects:
c0Bullets: Energy efficiency and environmentally conscious execution
On-time, complete handover as a standard
AboutApproach.c0Body: It integrates field experience in energy and engineering with operational strength on construction projects, managing financial discipline and technical rigor together.
AboutApproach.c0ImageAlt: Corporate approach — project and technical execution
AboutApproach.c1Lead: Yapitek’s project methodology is built on a systematic, strategic process:
AboutApproach.c1Body: With this model, every project is not only built—it is planned, developed, and shaped to create value.
AboutApproach.c2MissionP1: To develop projects that raise quality of life, add value to their surroundings, and remain sustainable from an investment perspective—offering aesthetic, functional, and dependable solutions for modern urban living.
AboutApproach.c2MissionP2: To become a trusted brand in the sector by putting user needs at the center and building durable, high-quality structures.
AboutApproach.c2VisionP1: To stand out in development and construction through innovative architecture, strong engineering foundations, and a strategic investment outlook—becoming a reference brand nationally and internationally.
AboutApproach.c2VisionP2: To be a leading construction company that creates sustainable value through projects that anticipate tomorrow’s living standards today.
AboutApproach.c2ImageAlt: Mission and vision — city and architecture

AboutSection.label: Yapitek Anka Construction
AboutSection.title: Structures Rising with Confidence
AboutSection.p1: Yapitek Anka Construction develops projects by bringing engineering strength, architectural vision, and execution discipline together under one roof.
AboutSection.p2: In residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects, we build structures where every detail is meticulously planned and designed to generate long-term value.
AboutSection.p3: We approach every project not merely as a structure, but as a part of life itself.
AboutSection.p4: Because for us, construction means building not only today, but the future.

HomeLastProjects.title: Recent references we delivered and continue to build
HomeLastProjects.body: a current selection from residential, commercial, and civic work. each line is a story—open the projects page for the full portfolio or jump straight into a case study.

0.heading: RESIDENTIAL PROJECTS
0.line1: We develop residential projects that bring modern living, functional architecture, and strong investment value together.
0.line2: Each structure is shaped around user experience and long-term value.

1.heading: COMMERCIAL AND MIXED-USE STRUCTURES
1.line1: We produce projects that integrate housing, office, and commercial spaces with a sustainable revenue model.
1.line2: We design structures where life and commerce meet in balance.

2.heading: CORPORATE AND ADMINISTRATIVE BUILDINGS
2.line1: We develop functional and prestige-oriented structures tailored to corporate needs.
2.line2: Efficient use, strong architecture, and sustainable solutions are at the forefront.

3.heading: SOCIAL, CULTURAL, AND SPECIAL PROJECTS
3.line1: We design projects that support social life and focus on public use.
3.line2: We develop structures that strengthen education, culture, and social interaction.

ProjectEvartOran.conceptTitle: A New Definition of Modern Living
ProjectEvartOran.conceptP1: Evart Oran brings architectural aesthetics and functionality together, adding a fresh perspective to urban life. It is not only a building but a living platform shaped around user experience, quality of life, and investment value together.
ProjectEvartOran.conceptP2: Surrounded by greenery yet close to the city center, it offers a life that feels both dynamic and balanced.
ProjectEvartOran.archBody1: With high ceilings, generous glazing, and planning that maximizes daylight, Evart Oran responds to the expectations of contemporary living.
ProjectEvartOran.archBody2: Open kitchens, flexible layouts, and a user-centered approach ensure every square meter is used with purpose.
ProjectEvartOran.socialBody: Life at Evart Oran is not limited to apartments alone. Social spaces, landscape design, and supportive amenities deliver a holistic experience.
ProjectEvartOran.socialImageAlt: Evart Oran social and landscape areas
ProjectEvartOran.locationBody1: Located in Çankaya Oran, Evart Oran sits on one of Ankara’s most valuable axes. Its central position supports both living and business activity.
ProjectEvartOran.locationBody2: The mixed-use structure supports a sustainable revenue model while creating long-term value for investors.
ProjectEvartOran.locationImageAlt: Ankara Oran district and city context
ProjectEvartOran.closingBody: Evart Oran combines contemporary architecture, a central location, and investment potential in a future-ready living proposition.

ProjectEvartYalikavak.modelClosing: This is the defining difference from a classic residential-only product.
ProjectEvartYalikavak.conceptP1: Evart Yalikavak is designed as Bodrum’s first contemporary minimal residence.
ProjectEvartYalikavak.conceptP2: It balances the pace of city life with the ease of coastal living.
archBullets: Loft homes → high ceilings, gallery void
ProjectEvartYalikavak.archBody: Every square meter is planned for functional, adaptable living.
ProjectEvartYalikavak.socialTitle: Social space at the heart of living
ProjectEvartYalikavak.socialBody: Here, social amenities are not an add-on—they are the center of daily life.
ProjectEvartYalikavak.closingTitle: In Bodrum, live well—and earn with confidence

sections.title: EVART MANSION YALIKAVAK
sections.subtitle: A distinctive mansion lifestyle in Bodrum
sections.body: A limited collection offering an exclusive living experience.
sections.body2: This limited collection is not just a residence; it is a refined living experience where privacy, prestige, and quality of life converge.

sections.title: A New Definition of Privileged Living
sections.body: Evart Mansion Yalikavak redefines residential living in Bodrum with a mansion-scale concept beyond conventional developments.
sections.body2: It prioritizes space over density, exclusivity over crowds, and permanence over temporary living.

sections.title: A Limited and Controlled Living Concept
sections.subtitle: Only 28 Mansions
sections.body: Comprising just 28 residences, the project offers expansive space, enhanced privacy, and a truly refined living experience.

sections.title: In the Prestigious Area of Yalikavak
sections.body: A perfect balance between nature and accessibility.

sections.title: Low Density, Elevated Living Standards
sections.body: Developed on 48 acres with only 28 residences, the project offers a spacious and open living environment.

sections.title: Independence in Every Residence, Privacy in Every Detail
sections.body: Designed for maximum privacy and comfort.

sections.body: Each residence combines comfort, safety, and advanced infrastructure.

sections.title: Excellence Lies in the Details
sections.body: Interior materials are selected to reinforce a premium living standard.

sections.title: Every Residence Oriented to the View
sections.body: All residences are positioned to maximize sea views.

sections.title: Not a Season, but a Lifestyle
